feat.name: Homebrew Aasimar Ascension
entries: Increase your Constitution, Wisdom Charisma or inteligence score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
Your Guiding Angel has seen your efforts and has deemed you worthy of a divine present.

items.name: Advanced Transformation:
items.entry: You can use your divine transformation as a bonus action instead of an action. Furthermore you can transform a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus and regain the ability to do so when you finish a long rest.

items.name: Touch of a Healer:
items.entry: Your healing hands ability restores a number of hit points equal to double your level.

items.name: Divine Shroud:
items.entry: Once per long rest, when you would take radiant or necrotic damage you can gain immunity to that instace of damage.
